texto: Desperate, lonely, cut off from the human community which in many cases has ceased to exist, under the sentence of violent death, wracked by desires for intimacy they do not know how to fulfil, at the same time tormented by the presence of women, men turn to logic.
explicacao: Citação de Andrea Nye sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Desperate, lonely, cut off from the human community which in many cases has ceased to exist, unde…” articula reflexao, feminism, logic em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como luto e logic.
